Fern Por-rrrcAr- Pnecrrcps CoMMrssroN
428 J Street o Suite 620 o Sacramenro. CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 e Fax (916) 322-0886
December 28,2007
Julia M. Lew
Law Offices of McCormick, Kabot, Jenner, & Lew
1220 West Main Street
Visalia, California 93291
RE: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-07-190
Dear Ms. Lew:
This letter responds to your request for advice on behalf of Porterville City Council
Member Felipe Martinez regarding the conflict-of-interest provisions of the Political Reform
Act (the "Act").1 The Act requires the Commission to p.oride written advice to any person
whose duties under the Act are in question. (Section 831 1a0); Regulation 18329(a), copy
enclosed.) However, the Commission may decline to provide written advice if it would be
inappropriate to do so. (Regularion 18329(bX8)(F).)
Formal written advice is the application of law to a given set of facts provided by the
requestor and has the purpose of conferring immunity to the requestor. (Section 831 l4;-
Regulation 18329(b)(7).) After a careful review of the facts you provided, we decline to
provide written advice to you at this time. The same or very similar issues are currently the
subject of a pending complaint in the commission's Enforcement Division.
lf you have other questions on this matter, please contact me at (gt6) 322-5660.
Sincerely,
Scott Hallabrin
lam
Senior
Legal Division
wJLjgl

unless otherwise indicated.

sections.conclusion: After a careful review of the facts you provided, we decline to provide written advice to you at this time. The same or very similar issues are currently the subject of a pending complaint in the commission's Enforcement Division.
sections.question_synthetic: Whether City Council Member Felipe Martinez has conflict-of-interest violations under the Political Reform Act regarding unspecified facts and circumstances.
sections.conclusion_synthetic: The FPPC declines to provide formal written advice because the same or similar issues are the subject of a pending enforcement complaint with the Commission.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Declination letter with no separate Q&A sections; question inferred from request description in letter body; conclusion is explicitly stated in the declination section.

embedding.qa_text:
QUESTION: Whether City Council Member Felipe Martinez has conflict-of-interest violations under the Political Reform Act regarding unspecified facts and circumstances.

CONCLUSION: After a careful review of the facts you provided, we decline to provide written advice to you at this time. The same or very similar issues are currently the subject of a pending complaint in the commission's Enforcement Division.

embedding.summary: The FPPC declines to provide formal written advice to Julia M. Lew on behalf of Porterville City Council Member Felipe Martinez regarding Political Reform Act conflict-of-interest provisions because the matter is currently the subject of a pending enforcement complaint.
